description: Creates a point on a circle or ellipse at a given angle in degrees.
utility: Place a point on a circle/ellipse at a specific angle

arguments.name: shape
arguments.description: The circle or ellipse to place the point on

examples.expression:
C = circle(G, (0, 0), radius(3))
P = anglepoint(G, C, 45)

C = circle(G, (0, 0), radius(3))
Q = anglepoint(G, C, 180)

C = circle(G, (0, 0), radius(4))
P1 = anglepoint(G, C, 0)
P2 = anglepoint(G, C, 90)
P3 = anglepoint(G, C, 180)
P4 = anglepoint(G, C, 270)
